title: Jedi starfighter (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|the term|the video game ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''}}
[[File:Jsf_duo2.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin's]] [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighters]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].]]
'''Jedi starfighter''' was the term used to describe any [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] normally piloted by a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Vessels designated as "Jedi starfighters" included:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Jedi Vector]]
*[[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]]
*[[Delta-7B Aethersprite-class light interceptor|Delta-7B ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]]
*[[Eta-2 Actis-class light interceptor|Eta-2 ''Actis''-class light interceptor]]
*[[Quinlan Vos's Jedi starfighter]]
*[[Yoda's fighter]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Delta-6 Sprite-class starfighter|Delta-6 ''Sprite''-class starfighter]]
*[[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]]
*[[Delta-7B Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7B ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]]
*[[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Eta-2 ''Actis''-class interceptor]]
*[[Savage Star fighter]]
*[[StealthX]]
*[[Redshift]]
*[[Rho-1 Limulus-class courier/Legends|Rho-1 ''Limulus''-class starfighter/courier]]
*[[Whitecloak fighter]]
*[[Zonama Sekotan fighter]]

{{Disambig}}
